summary: All 18 tasks complete. 5 new test files (33 new tests), 3 new implementation files, 7 modified files, 1 new skill with gemini-cli copy.
learnings: lint-staged stash/restore can include uncommitted changes from the working tree in unrelated commits -- Phase 3+4 content landed via commit 93f2374 instead of a dedicated commit
SKILL.md structure tests require ## Examples section -- plan did not include it in the initial SKILL.md creation tasks
Task 12 (config format) required no file changes since the ForbiddenImportRule type from Task 2 already documents the optional alternative field
